text: Mostly useful and fast, but the phrasing was a bit sloppy and I needed the exact usable lines, not placeholders.
I’m pretty satisfied — I got a clear feel for Qapla’, majQa’, and batlh, and I liked that the explanation focused on cultural context as well as usable phrases.
I liked how the tutor matched my curiosity and helped me practice nuqneH, bIQuch’a’, and Qapla’, but a few of the Klingon explanations felt a bit shaky or overconfident for a beginner.
Useful and fast, and you kept giving me phrases I could actually use. A bit messy with a few odd or shaky suggestions, but you did confirm my repeats and got me to usable openers and closers.
I’m pretty satisfied — I got the key phrases and their cultural feel, and the mini-dialogue really helped me see how they work in context.
I liked the enthusiasm and the back-and-forth practice, but there were a lot of shaky or incorrect Klingon forms, so I’d rate it pretty low overall.
